mapper.select:
SELECT p.program_id, p.category, p.thumb, p.title, p.price, p.active, p.approved,
w.name, w.address, w.profile_img,
(SELECT AVG(rating) FROM review WHERE program_id = p.program_id) AS avgRating, (SELECT COUNT(review_id) FROM review WHERE program_id = p.program_id) AS countReview, (SELECT COUNT(wish_id) FROM wish WHERE program_id = p.program_id) AS countWish FROM program p JOIN workshop w ON p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE p.active = true AND p.approved = '승인' ORDER BY avgRating desc

SELECT p.program_id, p.title, p.price, p.category, p.description, p.duration_min, p.difficulty, p.active, p.thumb, p.approved, ws.workshop_id, ws.name AS workshopName, ws.address, ws.profile_img, IFNULL(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS countReview, COUNT(DISTINCT q.qna_id) AS countQna, COUNT(DISTINCT w.wish_id) AS countWish FROM program p JOIN workshop ws ON p.workshop_id = ws.workshop_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.program_id = r.program_id LEFT JOIN qna_workshop q ON p.program_id = q.program_id LEFT JOIN wish w ON p.program_id = w.program_id AND w.active = TRUE WHERE p.program_id = #{programId}

SELECT p.program_id, p.title, p.price, p.category, p.active, p.approved, p.thumb, ws.workshop_id, ws.name, ws.address, IFNULL(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS countReview, COUNT(DISTINCT w.wish_id) AS countWish FROM program p JOIN workshop ws ON p.workshop_id = ws.workshop_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.program_id = r.program_id LEFT JOIN wish w ON p.program_id = w.program_id AND w.active = TRUE WHERE ws.workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND p.approved = '승인' GROUP BY p.program_id

SELECT DISTINCT p.*, w.name AS name, w.address AS address, w.contact_number, w.profile_img AS profileImg, -- 프로그램별 찜 개수 (wish 테이블 기준) COALESCE(wish_count_table.countWish, 0) AS countWish, COALESCE(review_table.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(review_table.reviewCount, 0) AS reviewCount
FROM program p JOIN workshop w ON p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON s.program_id = p.program_id -- 여기에 위시 테이블을 연결 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT program_id, COUNT(*) AS countWish FROM wish WHERE active = 1 GROUP BY program_id ) AS wish_count_table ON p.program_id = wish_count_table.program_id -- 리뷰 평균 테이블 연결 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT program_id, AVG(rating) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount FROM review GROUP BY program_id ) AS review_table ON p.program_id = review_table.program_id
WHERE p.active = true AND p.approved = '승인'
( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{word}, '%') OR w.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{word}, '%') OR p.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{word}, '%') OR w.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{word}, '%') )
AND w.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (s.capacity >= #{capacity} OR s.schedule_id IS NULL)
AND (s.capacity >= 10 OR s.schedule_id IS NULL)
AND (s.capacity >= 20 OR s.schedule_id IS NULL)
AND (s.capacity >= 30 OR s.schedule_id IS NULL)
AND p.duration_min BETWEEN 0 AND 60
AND p.duration_min BETWEEN 61 AND 120
AND p.duration_min BETWEEN 121 AND 180
AND p.duration_min >= 181
AND p.difficulty IN
#{item}
AND p.price >= #{minPrice}
AND p.price <= #{maxPrice}
ORDER BY p.program_id DESC
ORDER BY avgRating DESC
ORDER BY p.price ASC
ORDER BY p.price DESC
ORDER BY COALESCE(p.duration_min, 99999) ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(p.duration_min, -1) DESC
ORDER BY w.name ASC
ORDER BY w.name DESC
ORDER BY p.program_id DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.total_price, r.num_people, p.active, p.program_id, p.title, p.thumb, w.workshop_id, w.name AS name,
s.start_time -- 내가 수강한 날짜 FROM reservation r JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.schedule_id JOIN program p ON s.program_id = p.program_id JOIN workshop w ON p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status IN ('확정', '수강종료') AND s.end_time < NOW() ORDER BY s.start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO program ( workshop_id, title, description, category, price, duration_min, difficulty, thumb, schedule_type, period_start, period_end ) VALUES ( #{workshopId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{price}, #{durationMin}, #{difficulty}, #{thumb}, #{scheduleType}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd})
mapper.update: UPDATE program SET title=#{title}, description =#{description}, price =#{price}, difficulty =#{difficulty}, duration_min = #{durationMin}, created_at = NOW() WHERE program_id =#{programId}
mapper.select: SELECT program_image_id, image, img_no FROM program_image WHERE program_id = #{programId}

SELECT p.program_id, p.title, p.description, p.category, p.price, p.thumb, p.duration_min, p.difficulty, p.schedule_type, p.period_start, p.period_end, p.status, p.active, p.approved, p.created_at, w.workshop_id, w.name, u.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.email FROM program p JOIN workshop w ON w.workshop_id = p.workshop_id LEFT JOIN user u ON w.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE program_id = #{programId}

SELECT p.program_id,p.workshop_id, p.title, p.approved, a.reason, a.created_at AS logCreatedAt FROM program p JOIN action_log a ON p.program_id = a.target_id AND a.target_type = 'PROGRAM' WHERE p.approved = '거절' AND p.program_id = #{programId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
